title: Concept Mapping Review
description: Review and approve AI-suggested concept mappings from source values to OMOP standard vocabulary concepts. Each unmapped value needs a confirmed standard concept before the ETL can proceed.
tips: Confidence badges show how certain the AI is about each mapping suggestion — review low-confidence mappings carefully.
Use 'Batch Accept' to approve all high-confidence mappings at once, then manually review the rest.
Click a source value to open the concept browser and search for alternative mappings.
Concepts with a 'Standard' badge are preferred — avoid mapping to non-standard or deprecated concepts.
All mapping decisions are logged with your user ID for audit trail purposes.
